name: orch
description: Fleet orchestration control plane for various coding afent harness's and multiplexers for optimal coding agent orchestration and control from any provider.

scripts.check: bun run lint && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun run check:bridge
scripts.fallow:accept: bunx fallow dupes --save-baseline .fallow-dupes-baseline.json && bunx fallow health --save-baseline .fallow-health-baseline.json
scripts.check:web: bun --filter orch-web lint && bun --filter orch-web tc
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run check:web
scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:web
scripts.build:cli: bun run build:ext && bun run build:bin && bun run build:daemon && bun run build:hooks && bun run build:notify
scripts.build:bin: bun build bin/orch.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile dist/bin/orch.js && bun scripts/build-bin.ts
scripts.build:dev: bun run build:cli && tarball=$(npm pack --silent) && npm install -g "./$tarball" && rm -f "$tarball" && bun scripts/record-runtime.ts && bun scripts/sync-claude-integration.ts && (orch daemon reload || orch daemon start)
scripts.lint: oxlint bin src test extensions scripts

author: Bryan Edman
